descriptor: 22 Strong Foundation helps donors fund recovery care for veterans, student athletes, cancer survivors, and neighbors when cost, coverage, timing, or access threatens the next appointment.
address: 4120 Birch St, Suite 106, Newport Beach, CA 92660

monthly.22: $22 a month helps 22 Strong plan ahead for future recovery appointments.
monthly.100: $100 a month helps keep care moving when a recovery plan is at risk of stopping too soon.
monthly.250: $250 a month helps fund multiple hands-on recovery sessions across the year.
monthly.1000: $1,000 a month can anchor a full care plan for someone rebuilding strength and mobility.
monthly.default: Monthly gifts help 22 Strong plan care before a recovery gap turns into a stopped plan.

oneTime.22: $22 helps move someone one step closer to care.
oneTime.100: $100 helps offset the cost of a hands-on recovery session.
oneTime.250: $250 helps carry someone through several recovery touchpoints.
oneTime.1000: $1,000 can move a full care plan within reach.
oneTime.default: Your gift helps turn a stalled recovery plan into real appointments.
